reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 1449.7 (vs ATR-Ref: 531.06). 2. SL Dist: 1156.3 (>=1.2x ATR). 3. TP/SL Ratio: 1.25 (>=1.2). 4. Floor Check: Price (65906.3) is above VAL (64962.74), prohibiting a BEARISH stance. Logic: Despite the bearish momentum and 'bear flag' structure noted in the critique, the price is currently holding the structural support of the Value Area Low (VAL). Per the hard constraint, a bearish opinion is prohibited while price remains above this floor. This setup targets a mean-reversion move toward the Point of Control (POC) at 67694.5. The SL is placed strictly below the VAL to mitigate the risk of a liquidity void breakdown, while the TP is front-run by 0.5% from the POC to ensure capture of the move.
reasoning_zh: 1. 止盈距离: 1449.7 (ATR参考值: 531.06)。 2. 止损距离: 1156.3 (>=1.2x ATR)。 3. 盈亏比: 1.25 (>=1.2)。 4. 底部检查: 价格 (65906.3) 高于价值区低点 VAL (64962.74)，严禁看空。 逻辑：尽管批评意见指出目前存在看跌动能和‘熊旗’结构，但价格目前仍守在价值区低点 (VAL) 这一结构性支撑之上。根据硬性约束，价格在 VAL 之上时禁止看空。本计划博取向成交量控制点 (POC) 67694.5 的均值回归。止损位严格设置在 VAL 下方，以规避进入‘流动性真空区’的风险，止盈位则在 POC 基础上提前 0.5% 设置，以确保利润兑现。
